General.Name: Kingbo Strike Ltd
General.Description: Prosperity Group International Limited, together with its subsidiaries, supplies and installs solar photovoltaic parts and equipment in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It operates through three segments: Solar Power Business; Electrical Distribution System Business; and Beauty and Health Business. The company provides electrical distribution systems, including distribution boards, junction boxes, cables, and switches, as well as energy storage power systems; and trades in beauty and health products. It also engages in electrical works and general building engineering services. The company was formerly known as Kingbo Strike Limited and changed its name to Prosperity Group International Limited in February 2025. Prosperity Group International Limited was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Mirror Tower, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
